/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

Isticmaal protocol-ka https.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: shaqada si ay u fuliso amar shell ah oo ay qabato soo saariddiisa; mas'uulka waa kan uu bixiyo xusuusta; HA U BAANIN inaad sameyso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waxaa la siin doonaa marka dambe (laakiin ku dhawaaq halkan si aad u isticmaasho).

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar iyadoo loo adeegsanayo qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string ah.
Hints: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl waqti gaar ah oo loogu talagalay faylka qaabka DSA.

@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saariddiisa; mas'uulka waa isticmaalaha in uu xorriyadda xusuusta u siiyo; HA U BAHAANIN inaad samayso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waxaa la siin doonaa xigta (laakiin ku dhawaaq halkan si aad u isticmaasho).

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, u soo saar adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string ah.
Hikradaha: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayl waqtiga ah si loo keydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo keydinayo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl waqtiga ah oo gaar ah faylka qaabka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:

        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Xogta XML ayaa la fasirayaa oo macluumaadka ardayga loo soo celinayaa isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ee la bixiyay. Qaabka xogta XML wuxuu noqon doonaa sidan:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaa karnaa weydiinta XPath oo aan u isticmaalno inaan raadino.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaalaha ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Khariid (map) oo ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga (magaca, da'da, dhalashada) haddii la helo, haddii kale khariid madhan.

Xogta XML ee la soo saaro oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee loogu talagalay magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah. Xogta XML waxay leedahay qaabkan soo socda:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaynaa weydi XPath oo aan u isticmaalayno inaan raadino.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ku jirta macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaalaha ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Khariidad (map) oo ku jirta macluumaadka ardayga (magaca, da'da, dhalashada) haddii la helo, haddii kale khariidad madhan.

Xogta XML u fasir oo macluumaadka ardayga loogu talagalay magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah soo celi. Xogta XML waxay leedahay qaabkan soo socda:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaynaa weydiinta XPath oo aan u isticmaalaynaa raadinta.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaalaha ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Khariid (map) ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga (magaca, da'da, dhalashada) haddii la helo, haddii kale khariid madhan.

Xogta XML-ka u fasir oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee loo baahan yahay username-ka iyo password-ka. Xogta XML-ku waxay leedahay qaabkan soo socda:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>

        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaynaa weydi XPath oo aan u isticmaalaynaa inaan raadino.

@param xml_data Xogta XML-ka ee ku jirta macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Username-ka ardayga loo raadinayo.
@param password Password-ka ardayga loo raadinayo.

@return Khariidad (map) oo ku jirta macluumaadka ardayga (magaca, da'da, dhalashada) haddii la helo, haddii kale khariidad madhan.

Xogta XML ee la soo saaro oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee loogu talagalay magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah. Qaabka xogta XML wuxuu noqon doonaa sidan:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaynaa weydiinta XPath oo aan u isticmaalaynaa inaan raadino.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaalaha ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Khariid (map) oo ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga (magaca, da'da, dhalashada) haddii la helo, haddii kale khariid madhan.
